Anthony Bourdain, Kitchen Confidential. People: Mario, Dimitri, Bobby, Tyrone, Howard Mitcham, Chef Bernard, Lydia, Tommy, Jimmy, Bruce Lee, Iggy Pop, Hunter Thompson, John Wayne, Julia Child, Idi Amin, Escoffier. Places: Provincetown, Cape Cod, Vassar College, Hyde Park, Culinary Institute of America, Christopher Street, Hudson River, Key West, Khe Sanh, Portugal, Ecuadorian. Terms: Dreadnaught, Larousse Gastronomique, Escoffier Room, chaud-froid, demi-glace, sous-chef, grillardin, saucier, garde-manger, mise en place, brigade de cuisine, Black Truffle, Crown Roast, Mushroom Duxelle Stuffing, Cape Codders, Grill Bitch, All That Jazz, Aye Matey, Mal Carne, Tant pis.
